About Treetop

Built by someone who
does the work.

Treetop Growth Strategy is a boutique AI implementation consultancy. We don't train. We implement. We build Claude workflows inside your business and prove they work before we leave.

Bill Colbert · Founder

20 years building
revenue systems.

I've spent two decades in B2B sales, marketing, and revenue operations — building the systems that make businesses grow. Before founding Treetop, I was CMO at Factor_ (acquired by HelloFresh, INC 5000 in 2017 and 2018) and VP Sales & Marketing at amSTATZ (acquired by NASM in 2016). Since 2016, I've run Treetop as a fractional GTM / CMO practice, working with B2B SaaS, DTC, fitness, enterprise hardware, and PE-backed portfolio companies across more than a dozen named engagements.

The work I do now lives at the intersection of two things: senior marketing leadership for $2M–$50M companies that aren't ready for a full-time CMO, and AI-native operating systems that make modern marketing functions 1–2 FTE leaner than the 2020 norm. The two compound — that's the practice.

Treetop's smaller, gym-operator-focused content cluster exists because I co-founded fitagentic.ai — the AI agent platform for fitness operators — and I write about the operator problems I'm solving daily there. The fractional consulting practice and the platform sit alongside each other.

CMO at Factor_
Acquired by HelloFresh. INC 5000 in 2017 + 2018. Scaled paid acquisition $0 → $4K+/day; CAC $129 → $64; 1,100% email revenue lift.
VP at amSTATZ
Acquired by NASM in 2016. Took the B2B SaaS function from pre-concept to mid-six-figure ARR. Cut churn 11.7% → 3.9%.
Hapana — 150 → 1,200+ locations
Six-year fractional Head of Marketing & GTM engagement. 800% revenue growth across NA / EMEA / APAC.
EZO.io — RevOps + GTM systems
Ongoing fractional Revenue & Systems Lead. 100+ executive dashboards, +40% forecasting accuracy, +24% enterprise opps.
Synchrony Financial
Cold LinkedIn pitch to an SVP → $200K enterprise lead-gen engagement → six-year client relationship.
HubSpot Gold-tier · 47 deals closed
8-year HubSpot agency partner. $3.38M in attributed LTV. 65+ HubSpot accounts touched.
Treetop Growth Strategy
Founded 2016. Fractional GTM/CMO + AI-native operating systems for $2M-$50M companies.
Chicago, IL
Serving clients across North America remotely, with quarterly in-person sessions and additional travel as engagements require.
Our approach

We don't hand you
a prompt sheet.

Implementation, not training.

Trainers teach you what's possible. We build what's possible. There's a significant difference between knowing Claude can help and having Claude actually integrated into your daily workflows — doing real work, producing real output, saving real hours.

Measured outcomes, not vibes.

Every engagement starts with baselines and ends with data. Hours saved. Output volume. Quality metrics. You know exactly what the investment returned — not because we say so, but because you can see it in the numbers.

Your business, not a template.

We configure Claude with your brand voice, your product knowledge, your SOPs. The output sounds like you — not a generic AI that could belong to any company. Every system we build is specific to how your business actually operates.

Selected engagements

A few of the named
Treetop case studies.

Each links to a full case study with the engagement context, what we built, and the quantified outcomes. Published with client consent; specific revenue figures aggregated for confidentiality.

  • Factor_ (acquired by HelloFresh) — fractional CMO during the hyper-growth year. 66% revenue growth in 6 months, INC 5000 ×2.
  • Hapana — global fitness SaaS — six-year fractional Head of Marketing & GTM. 150 → 1,200+ operator locations (800% growth) across NA / EMEA / APAC.
  • EZO.io — enterprise SaaS revenue systems — ongoing fractional Revenue & Systems Lead. 100+ executive dashboards, +40% forecasting accuracy, +24% enterprise opps.
  • The Axle Workout — COVID B2B-to-DTC pivot — 3-year CMRO engagement. 400% YoY revenue, Shopify CVR 0.45% → 1.27%, $400K virtual coaching ARR.
  • The Stack System — DTC specialty product — 12-month fractional engagement. 245% YoY revenue, 20-36x ROAS on Meta, 200% ROI evergreen influencer partnership.
  • Synchrony Financial — enterprise lead-gen — $200K custom engagement won via cold LinkedIn pitch. Six-year client relationship.
  • Connected fitness hardware portfolio — cross-portfolio fractional GTM across Styku, Ecofit, Vertimax, Core Health & Fitness.

Browse all case studies →

Work with Treetop

Three ways to get started.

Fractional CMO
AI-native fractional marketing leadership for $2M-$50M B2B SaaS, DTC, fitness operators, and PE-backed portfolios. 1-3 days/week, 9-18 month engagements.
$8K-$25K/month
Explore the service →
AI Implementation
Full-service implementation of AI agent workflows inside your marketing function — configured, trained, and measured. Audit + build packages available.
Starting at $2,500
Read more →
Gym Budget Workbook — PRO
The interactive 12-sheet editable spreadsheet version of the free /gym-startup-budget-workbook. Live formulas, scenario toggles, capital-stack builder. For aspiring gym operators.
$99 — one-time
Buy now →
